titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 1, no. 74: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 74. (A.R. No. 610 of 1920.) UḌAIYĀGUḌI, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the outerbase of the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Anantēśvara temple.

p.hi: Parakēsarivarman, who took the head of Vīrapāṇḍya (Āditya II) Year 4: 964 A.D.

summary.p: Records the endowment made by Kāḷaiyaṉ Kōḍaṉ, who was a sāma-nāyakaṉ in the military unit, mūtta paḻaiya vāḷ, on the day of Kārttigai in the month of Makara coinciding with Monday in the year cited, for feeding a brāhmaṇa at uttamāgram (daily). For this purpose he had entrusted to the gaṇapperumakkaḷ, who were administering the temple, thirty five and half kaḻañju of gold. He had also donated vessels, taḷigai and vaṭṭil for preparing the food. Details of the items of food to be provided are given in this record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pāṇṭiyaṉ talaikoṇṭa kopparakecaripaṉmakku yāṇṭu 4 (mu)vatu vaṭakarai brahmadeyam śrīviranārāyaṇa caturvvedimaṅgalattu tiruvanan=taśvarattāḷvār koyilile mūtta paḻaiya vāḷin cāmayanāyakaṉ kāḷaiyaṉ koṭan
Ivvāṭṭai makaranāyaṟṟut tiṅkaṭkiḻamai peṟṟa kārttikai nāṉṟu Uttamāgrattukkuk kalamoṉṟu candrādityavat nicati nellum patiṉāḻiyum kaḻañcu poṉṉāl kalanellup poli koṇṭu
Uṇpārkkuk kaṟi kummāyamum kāykkaṟiyum puḷiyaṅkaṟiyum porikkaṟiyum neyyāḻākkum tayir nāḻiyum pākku nālum pattu veṟṟilaiyumiṭṭuṭṭuvataṟkuk kuṭuttapoṉ kaḻañciṟ perttatu muppat
taiṅ kaḻañcaraiy taḷikaiyoṉṟu muppattaṟu palam vaṭṭiloṉṟaim palam vaṭṭiṟ kāloṉṟu Ippoṉkoṇṭu paramasvāmi śrīkāryyamārāyum kaṇapperumakkaḷom Uttamāgramoṉṟu candrādityava
t Ūṭṭuvikkak kaṭavomāṉom Itu paṉmāheśvararakṣai Ivai kaṇapperumakkaḷ paṇiyāl neṟkuppaiyuṭaiyāṉāṉa tiruvanan=taśvarap peruṅkāviti veḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 1, no. 74 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
